creator: denis.troshchanovich@gmail.com
text:
We've faced some bugs after the poptop upgrade concerning the limit of concurrent vpn-connections - pptpd refused to accept connections after a certain number of users connected so it'd be useful to put poptop 1.3.4 in a different port still leaving the stable version unchanged. 

PORTNAME=       poptop
PORTVERSION=    1.3.4
PORTREVISION=   1
CATEGORIES=     net

current experimental version 	1.3.2
current stable version 	1.3.0
old stable version 	1.2.3

Fix: 

Put the experimental version of poptop in /usr/ports/net/poptop1_3_4 and leave poptop 1.3.0 in /usr/ports/poptop.
How-To-Repeat: Organize over about 400 vpn-connections on a vpn-server using poptop with a version newer than 1.3.0
